2026/05/22 21:38:16.593930511 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/05/22 21:38:16.593955788 {

2026/05/22 21:38:16.593971918 new <- list()

2026/05/22 21:38:16.594077695 new$version <- version
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594078517 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594095479 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594096350 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594113883 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594116658 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594134041 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594135033 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594150562 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594151513 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594168428 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594170922 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594194777 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594195989 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594225414 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594226666 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594241684 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594242566 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594266568 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594309581 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594311054 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594325651 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594326513 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594340098 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594341150 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594361027 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/05/22 21:38:16.594372817 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594384220 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594385102 "default"))
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594432150 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594433452 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594447028 }
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594447869 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594465442 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594466224 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594480340 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/05/22 21:38:16.594498394 }
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594499476 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594517627 }
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594556803 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594558596 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594574055 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594574987 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594589003 domain = NA)
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594589674 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594601326 }

2026/05/22 21:38:16.594614961 old$family <- family
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594615713 }
2026/05/22 21:38:16.594627815 version <- old$version

2026/05/22 21:38:16.594749042 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,

2026/05/22 21:38:16.594850230 invisible()
